mapper.select: SELECT d.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, usr.user_nm AS manager_nm, cd_dt.code_label AS dept_type_cd_nm FROM sy_dept d LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = d.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = d.manager_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_dt ON cd_dt.code_grp = 'DEPT_TYPE' AND cd_dt.code_value = d.dept_type_cd WHERE d.dept_id = #{id}
